summary: Successfully tested Weekly Program panel bug fix - Pazar day tab is now visible and functional
passed_tests: Dashboard loads successfully with seeded localStorage credentials
All 7 weekday tabs (Pazartesi through Pazar) are present in the UI
Pazar tab is visible, enabled, and clickable
Tab layout displays properly in 3-column grid format
No visual clipping or truncation of Pazar tab
Other weekday tabs (Pazartesi, Cuma, Cumartesi) still function correctly
